trades_closed_has_result_check.name: trades_closed_has_result_check
trades_closed_has_result_check.value: "trades"."status" = 'open' or ("trades"."exit_at" is not null and ("trades"."exit_price" is not null or "trades"."manual_pnl" is not null))

trades_directional_stop_check.name: trades_directional_stop_check
trades_directional_stop_check.value: "trades"."stop_loss" is null or ("trades"."direction" = 'Long' and "trades"."stop_loss" < "trades"."entry_price") or ("trades"."direction" = 'Short' and "trades"."stop_loss" > "trades"."entry_price")

trades_directional_target_check.name: trades_directional_target_check
trades_directional_target_check.value: "trades"."planned_target" is null or ("trades"."direction" = 'Long' and "trades"."planned_target" > "trades"."entry_price") or ("trades"."direction" = 'Short' and "trades"."planned_target" < "trades"."entry_price")
